assumptions: Report name is 'Consistency' and lives under the Models tab alongside the existing cross-domain Stability view
Metric 1 is named 'Repeatability' (user-recommended option (a) from the offered list); name can be revisited during plan phase if desired
Metric 2 is named 'Coherence' (no collision with existing vocabulary)
'Stability' stays reserved for the existing Models-tab cross-domain win-rate consistency metric; do not overload it
Repeatability reuses baselineReliability from analysisSemantics.reliability.ts (buildMergedReliabilityModel), coverage-weighted across scenarios
Coherence is a new metric: Spearman rank correlation (rho >= 0.8, p < 0.05) between condition pressure rank and win rate across conditions, aggregated as fraction of value pairs that pass, per model
Confidence intervals use Wilson score (95%); shown as '+/- X%' next to each metric

Main view is a scatter: x=Repeatability, y=Coherence, dot color=provider, dot size=n trials; quadrant lines at 0.85 Repeatability and 0.80 Coherence with plain-English region labels ('Reliable & follows pressure', 'Follows pressure but jittery', 'Steady but doesn't follow pressure', 'Neither steady nor responsive')
Drill-down per model shows: Repeatability by domain, a grid of existing ConditionMatrix thumbnails shaded green/red by monotonicity, and an order-effect panel reusing PairedStabilityView data
On-page copy uses high-school English and shows the exact equation alongside each metric (not just in a methods appendix)
Primary audiences: AAPOR survey methodologists and AI alignment researchers; secondary: ACM reviewers, moral-psychology researchers, AI policy/governance analysts
Data is already gathered; no new model runs or new vignettes in scope. Depends on AGGREGATE-analysis pipeline being populated, which user is fixing in parallel
discovery.summary: Discovery satisfied from prior conversation with user; no new questions needed. Carrying in explicit assumptions.
non_goals: Debugging or fixing the AGGREGATE-analysis pipeline (tracked separately by user)
acceptance_criteria: No existing Models-tab Stability functionality is broken or renamed

parallel_analysis.note: Parallel opportunities documented in tasks.md section 'Parallel Task Summary'. Safe same-slice parallel pairs: A1 stat functions and A1b tests; C1 scatter + C2 table + C3 footer (disjoint files); D1 drill + D3 filters. Partial parallel: D1 drill depends on D2 MetricDisclosure — build D2 first in isolation.
